name: helpers
title: Helpers
description: A collection of system helper commands.
author: ajgon

commands.name: power-off-monitors
commands.title: Power Off Monitors
commands.description: Powers off all monitors via niri.

preferences.name: command
preferences.title: Shell Command
preferences.description: Space-separated command to run (no shell expansion).

commands.name: caffeinate
commands.title: Caffeinate
commands.description: Toggles idle inhibitor to prevent the system from sleeping.

preferences.name: command
preferences.title: Shell Command
preferences.description: Space-separated command to run (no shell expansion).

preferences.name: command
preferences.title: Shell Command
preferences.description: Space-separated command to run (no shell expansion).

commands.name: ytcast
commands.title: YTCast
commands.description: Casts a YouTube URL to a Chromecast device chosen from a list.

preferences.name: devices
preferences.title: Devices
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of devices in 'Name:device-id' format, e.g. 'Living Room:abc123, Bedroom:def456'.

commands.name: add-todo
commands.title: Add Todo
commands.description: Adds a todo item. Include @work or #work to flag it.

preferences.name: command
preferences.title: Shell Command
preferences.default: noctalia-shell ipc call plugin:todo addTodo {input} medium
preferences.description: Command template for regular todos. Use {input} as placeholder for the todo text.

preferences.name: workCommand
preferences.title: Shell Command (Work)
preferences.default: noctalia-shell ipc call plugin:todo addTodo {input} medium 1
preferences.description: Command template for work todos (@work / #work). Use {input} as placeholder for the todo text.
